ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "year_birth" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "kidhome" INTEGER /* Number of kids in the home */,
  "teenhome" INTEGER /* Number of teenagers in the home */,
  "dt_customer" TEXT /* Date when the customer was added to the database */,
  "recency" INTEGER /* Recency score indicating how recently the customer made a purchase */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "mnt_wines" REAL /* Amount spent on wines */,
  "mnt_fruits" REAL /* Amount spent on fruits */,
  "mnt_meat_products" REAL /* Amount spent on meat products */,
  "mnt_fish_products" REAL /* Amount spent on fish products */,
  "mnt_sweet_products" REAL /* Amount spent on sweet products */,
  "mnt_gold_products" REAL /* Amount spent on gold products */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer engaged in the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "engagement_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the customer engaged with the campaign */,
  "accepted_cmp1" INTEGER /* Indicates acceptance of campaign 1 */,
  "accepted_cmp2" INTEGER /* Indicates acceptance of campaign 2 */,
  "accepted_cmp3" INTEGER /* Indicates acceptance of campaign 3 */,
  "accepted_cmp4" INTEGER /* Indicates acceptance of campaign 4 */,
  "accepted_cmp5" INTEGER /* Indicates acceptance of campaign 5 */,
  "response" INTEGER /* Response status of the customer to marketing efforts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_engagement_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the complaint */,
  "complain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has made a complaint (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the complaint */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_country" (
  "customer_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-country association */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_country_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_country_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase summary record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer across all purchases */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of each customer's purchases */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_summary_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
